name: Wren
role: The Spindrift child who gives warnings about things that haven't happened
voiceHints: Speaks in the wrong tense — was, will, is, all at once — and can't tell you which. Gentle, unafraid, a little lonely for people who move in one direction. Sometimes old, sometimes small, always Wren.
knowledge: Things that will happen, unsorted from things that did
Which of her warnings the Hollow-folk have learned to heed
The shape of a loop, from inside it — she can feel when someone's stuck
wants: To be understood by someone who lives forward, just once, without having to explain the grammar.
fears: That a warning she can't make clear enough will come true because no one believed her in time.

reactsToReputation.patient: trusts them with a warning that matters
reactsToReputation.dismissive: goes quiet, and the quiet is the loss

appearance: A small girl of seven or eight with an unusually still face, ash-blonde hair to her jaw, one grey eye and one brown. Wears adult clothing cut down and belted twice. Looks at the space beside people rather than at them.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.
